title: Martyrs
description: A young woman's quest for revenge against the people who kidnapped and tormented her as a child leads her and her best friend into a living hell.

title: Raw
description: A young vegetarian woman enters veterinary school where she is forced to eat meat during hazing. She soon develops a powerful craving for flesh.

title: Climax
description: French dancers gather at a remote castle for a rehearsal that spirals into madness after their sangria is laced with LSD.

title: High Tension
description: Two college friends vacation at a rural farmhouse, but their trip turns into a nightmare when a deranged killer arrives and begins a murderous rampage.

title: Inside
description: A pregnant woman alone on Christmas Eve is terrorized by a mysterious stranger who wants her unborn child.

title: Titane
description: A woman with a titanium plate in her head embarks on a bizarre journey after a series of violent events force her to go on the run.

title: Them
description: A couple living in their remote French countryside home are terrorized throughout the night by unseen assailants.

title: Incident in a Ghostland
description: A mother and her two daughters survive a brutal home invasion, but years later the trauma continues to haunt them in terrifying ways.

title: Revenge
description: A young woman left for dead in the desert after a brutal assault rises up to hunt down the three men responsible.

title: In My Skin
description: After suffering an accidental injury, a young woman becomes obsessively fascinated with her own body and begins a disturbing process of self-mutilation.

title: Frontière(s)
description: A group of young thieves fleeing Paris after riots seek refuge in a remote inn, only to discover it is run by a sadistic neo-Nazi family.

title: The Advent Calendar
description: A paraplegic woman receives a mysterious antique advent calendar that grants her wishes — but each gift comes with a deadly price.

title: The Night Eats the World
description: A man wakes up in a Paris apartment to find the city overrun by zombies and must survive alone in complete isolation.

title: Léon: The Professional
description: A professional hitman reluctantly takes in a 12-year-old girl after her family is murdered, and she asks him to train her as an assassin.

title: District 13
description: An undercover cop and a street-smart ex-con must infiltrate a dangerous ghetto to recover a neutron bomb before it destroys Paris.

title: La Femme Nikita
description: A violent young criminal is given a choice between death and a new life as a government-trained assassin.

title: Mesrine: Killer Instinct
description: The first part of the story of Jacques Mesrine, France's most notorious criminal, tracing his early life and rise as a gangster.

title: Mesrine: Public Enemy #1
description: The conclusion of Mesrine's story, following his daring prison escapes, bank robberies, and his inevitable end at the hands of the police.

title: Brotherhood of the Wolf
description: In 18th century France, the King's naturalist and his Iroquois blood brother are sent to investigate a series of brutal killings by a mysterious beast.

title: Taxi
description: A speed-obsessed taxi driver teams up with a bumbling police officer to catch a gang of German bank robbers in Marseille.

title: The Connection
description: A determined magistrate takes on the French Connection drug trafficking ring operating between Marseille and New York in the 1970s.

title: Point Blank
description: A nurse's aide is forced to break a murder suspect out of the hospital when criminals kidnap his pregnant wife.

title: The Nest
description: An elite squad of police officers must fight for survival when they become trapped in a warehouse with a group of ruthless illegal immigrants.

title: Sleepless Night
description: A cop with a shady past must infiltrate a nightclub to rescue his kidnapped son from a drug lord in one long, relentless night.

title: AKA
description: An undercover agent infiltrates a crime syndicate and unexpectedly bonds with the boss's young son, putting his mission and loyalties to the test.

title: Kiss of the Dragon
description: A Chinese intelligence officer is framed for murder in Paris and must clear his name while battling corrupt police and protecting a young woman.

title: Wasabi
description: A tough French detective travels to Tokyo after the death of his former lover and discovers he has a teenage daughter he never knew about.

title: Dobermann
description: A ruthless bank robber and his gang go on a crime spree across Paris while being relentlessly pursued by a sadistic police inspector.
